title: Weekly Review Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger weekly review foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Weekly Review Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Weekly Review Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good weekly review foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Weekly Review Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
